wins: Increased common stock dividend from $0.30 to $0.35 per share
Repurchased $12 billion of common stock in 2023
CIB revenue grew 26% from a year ago
Launched new co-branded credit cards with Choice Hotels
Exceeded $150 million commitment to advance racial equity in home ownership
risks: Net loan charge-offs increased from historical low levels
Net interest income is expected to decline in 2024
Consumer deposit balances continue to decline
Credit card revenue declined due to promotional rates and rewards expense
Uncertainty around Federal Reserve interest rate actions
